description: Maps Run Faster negative qualities reference table to run-faster.json data

mappings.notes: Most qualities match by name directly. Several reference rows are consolidated into single rated entries in data: 'Amnesia (Surface Loss)' and 'Amnesia (Neural Deletion)' map to id 'amnesia' (ratings 1 and 2 respectively). 'Poor Self Control (Braggart/Thrill-Seeker/Compulsive/Vindictive/Combat Monster)' all map to id 'poor-self-control' using requiresSpecification. 'Reduced (Smell/Taste/Hearing/Sight/Astral Sight/Touch)' all map to id 'reduced-sense' using requiresSpecification. 'Pie Iesu Domine. Dona Eis Requiem.' maps to id 'pie-iesu-domine' (data uses shorter name). The reference karma field is a string for tiered/formula costs while data uses karmaBonus (integer) for fixed-bonus qualities or hasRating/ratings for tiered ones.

unmappedReferenceRows.note: Maps to data entry id 'amnesia' at ratings.1 (karmaCost: 4, name: 'Partial')
Maps to data entry id 'amnesia' at ratings.2 (karmaCost: 8, name: 'Total')
